title: Ship better commits, faster.
tagline: AI-assisted commit message generation and repository analytics for teams that care about their history.

terminal.title: git-insight generate
terminal.result1: feat(auth): rotate refresh tokens on every session resume
terminal.result2: fix(auth): prevent stale JWT replay after sign-out
terminal.result3: refactor(auth): extract session-resume helper from middleware

features.heading: Everything your commit history deserves.
features.subheading: One workspace for AI-drafted messages, repository analytics, and team-wide policy enforcement.

generate.title: Streamed commit suggestions
generate.body: Paste a diff, pick a provider, get three Conventional Commits in under two seconds — PII stripped before any LLM call.

analytics.title: Repository analytics
analytics.body: Commit timeline, contribution heatmap, contributor stats, file-change frequency, and Conventional Commits quality trends.

policies.title: Visual policy engine
policies.body: Per-repo rules for types, scopes, length, body, and footer. Optional one-shot regeneration when a suggestion fails policy.

cli.title: First-class CLI
cli.body: git-insight generate --commit --copy. Same ts-rest contracts as the web app, so types never drift.

providers.title: Bring your own keys
providers.body: Encrypted-at-rest LLM keys with verification probe. Swap OpenAI and Anthropic per request, no lock-in.

security.title: Built secure by default
security.body: Row-level security, AES-256-GCM at rest, strict CSP, rate limiting, GitHub OAuth via Supabase Auth (PKCE).

workflow.heading: From diff to dashboard in three moves.

connect.title: Connect a repo
connect.body: Sign in with GitHub. Background sync pulls commits via Octokit and scores quality as it goes.

generate.title: Generate the message
generate.body: Paste a diff or pipe one from the CLI. We stream three Conventional Commits in <2 s TTFT.

ship.title: Ship with confidence
ship.body: Validate against your policy, copy the result, and push. Analytics update in the background.

stack.heading: Built on a stack you already trust.

finalCta.heading: Make every commit message worth reading.
finalCta.body: Free while in development. Sign in with GitHub or install the CLI to start in under a minute.

footer.tagline: AI-assisted commit messages and repository analytics.
footer.copyright: © {year} Commit Analyzer. Built as a diploma project.
